response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack web developer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but lacks nearly all core requirements for this embedded networking security role. There is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency (languages listed are English, Romanian, and basic German), which is a hard requirement. C experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and there is no demonstrated Linux kernel source modification, L2/L3 networking, or security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption). The profile fundamentally mismatches the role.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded contexts
Some C/C++ systems experience (NI LabWindows/CVI) and low-latency systems work with async I/O at Dunnhumby
Strong Linux, testing, and CI/CD craftsmanship background with community teaching experience
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — the role requires native-level Japanese
No embedded networking, switch, kernel-modification, or security-protocol (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP/NETCONF) experience
C proficiency is dated and brief; recent decade of work is almost entirely web/full-stack in TypeScript/Node.js

key_factors.factor: General seniority and systems programming exposure
